policy: Deduplicate only exact SHA-256 identities. Delete a source origin only when it is untracked or ignored, independently preserved, and has no inbound path, digest, import, package, symlink, or hardlink consequence.

excluded_candidates.reason: Lloyd STATE/ARTIFACTS.json records the exact path; the predeclaration names pi_stage0.py; this is an active two-file campaign package rather than an isolated duplicate
